name: ClipACanvas
description: ClipACanvas transforms HTML/CSS/JS animations into MP4 videos — entirely local, no uploads, no cloud. Powered by Chromium + FFmpeg for high-quality, browser-accurate rendering. Perfect for AI agents generating video content, demos, or visual explanations on-the-fly.
author: mechreaper007x

tools.name: render_video
tools.description: Render HTML/CSS/JS code to MP4 video, returned as base64-encoded string. Uses Chromium for browser capture and FFmpeg for encoding.

code.description: Complete HTML document with CSS and JS to render

frame_rate.description: Frame rate for capture and encoding

tools.name: render_video_to_file
tools.description: Same as render_video but saves the MP4 directly to a local file path instead of returning base64.

code.description: Complete HTML document with CSS and JS to render

output_path.description: Absolute file path where the MP4 will be saved
